queries.question: Which books are suggested in the Physics department and when they were published?
queries.sql: SELECT TextbookEditions.Textbooks, TextbookEditions.YearPublished FROM TextbookEditions JOIN BookCopies ON BookCopies.CopyID = TextbookEditions.EditionNumber JOIN CourseOfferings ON CourseOfferings.OfferingID = BookCopies.CourseOfferingID JOIN Instructors ON Instructors.ID =  CourseOfferings.InstructorID WHERE Instructors.Department = 'Physics'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?textbooks ?yearpublished WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .
  ?bookcopies a :BookCopies .
  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?courseofferings a :CourseOfferings .
  ?bookcopies p:hasCourseOfferings ?courseofferings .
  ?instructors a :Instructors .
  ?courseofferings p:hasInstructors ?instructors .
  ?textbookeditions p:Textbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbookeditions p:YearPublished ?yearpublished .
  ?instructors p:Department ?department_f .
  FILTER(STR(?copyid_l) = STR(?editionnumber_r))
  FILTER(STR(?department_f) = STR("Physics"))
}

queries.question: Which books are suggested in the Physics department and what versions?
queries.sql: SELECT TextbookEditions.Textbooks, TextbookEditions.EditionNumber, TextbookEditions.YearPublished FROM TextbookEditions JOIN BookCopies ON BookCopies.CopyID = TextbookEditions.EditionNumber JOIN CourseOfferings ON CourseOfferings.OfferingID = BookCopies.CourseOfferingID JOIN Instructors ON Instructors.ID =  CourseOfferings.InstructorID WHERE Instructors.Department = 'Physics'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?textbooks ?editionnumber ?yearpublished WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .

  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?courseofferings a :CourseOfferings .
  ?bookcopies p:hasCourseOfferings ?courseofferings .
  ?instructors a :Instructors .
  ?courseofferings p:hasInstructors ?instructors .
  ?textbookeditions p:Textbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber .

  FILTER(STR(?department_f) = STR("Physics"))

queries.question: What was the edition number and year of publication of the book with the smallest quantity and who published it?
queries.sql: SELECT TextbookEditions.Publisher, TextbookEditions.EditionNumber, TextbookEditions.YearPublished FROM TextbookEditions JOIN BookCopies ON BookCopies.CopyID = TextbookEditions.EditionNumber ORDER BY BookCopies.Quantity ASC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?publisher ?editionnumber ?yearpublished WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .
  ?bookcopies a :BookCopies .
  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?textbookeditions p:Publisher ?publisher .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber .
  ?textbookeditions p:YearPublished ?yearpublished .
  ?bookcopies p:Quantity ?quantity_o .
  FILTER(STR(?copyid_l) = STR(?editionnumber_r))
}
ORDER BY ASC(?quantity_o)
LIMIT 1

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which books are suggested in the Physics department and what versions?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/student#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/student/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?textbooks ?yearpublished WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .
  ?bookcopies a :BookCopies .
  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?courseofferings a :CourseOfferings .
  ?bookcopies p:hasCourseOfferings ?courseofferings .
  ?instructors a :Instructors .
  ?courseofferings p:hasInstructors ?instructors .
  ?textbookeditions p:Textbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbookeditions p:YearPublished ?yearpublished .
  ?instructors p:Department ?department_f .
  FILTER(STR(?copyid_l) = STR(?editionnumber_r))
  FILTER(STR(?department_f) = STR("Physics"))
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?textbooks ?editionnumber WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .
  ?bookcopies a :BookCopies .
  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?courseofferings a :CourseOfferings .
  ?bookcopies p:hasCourseOfferings ?courseofferings .
  ?instructors a :Instructors .
  ?courseofferings p:hasInstructors ?instructors .
  ?textbookeditions p:Textbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber .
  ?instructors p:Department ?department_f .
  FILTER(STR(?copyid_l) = STR(?editionnumber_r))
  FILTER(STR(?department_f) = STR("Physics"))
} }
  full: { SELECT ?textbooks ?editionnumber ?yearpublished WHERE {
  ?textbookeditions a :TextbookEditions .
  ?bookcopies a :BookCopies .
  ?bookcopies p:CopyID ?copyid_l .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber_r .
  ?courseofferings a :CourseOfferings .
  ?bookcopies p:hasCourseOfferings ?courseofferings .
  ?instructors a :Instructors .
  ?courseofferings p:hasInstructors ?instructors .
  ?textbookeditions p:Textbooks ?textbooks .
  ?textbookeditions p:EditionNumber ?editionnumber .
  ?textbookeditions p:YearPublished ?yearpublished .
  ?instructors p:Department ?department_f .
  FILTER(STR(?copyid_l) = STR(?editionnumber_r))
  FILTER(STR(?department_f) = STR("Physics"))
} }
}
